keyRules: Maximum flight altitude: 120 m above ground level (EASA Open Category).

Register as an operator if the drone weighs ≥250 g or is equipped with a camera or sensor. Private individuals must be at least 18 years old. The fee consists of a registration fee plus an annual maintenance fee—check the current amounts with the Swedish Transport Agency.

An A1/A3 drone license is required if the drone weighs 250 g or more — online theory test administered by the Swedish Transport Agency (for a fee; the license is valid for 5 years). Minimum age for operating a drone independently: 15 years. Those under 15 may fly only with a valid drone license under the supervision of a remote pilot aged 16 or older with a valid drone license.
The operator number must be clearly marked on the drone.
Keep the drone within visual line of sight (VLOS)—do not fly around corners or behind buildings.
A1: Drones weighing less than 250 g — fly over uninvolved individuals (not crowds).
A2: Drones weighing up to 4 kg — at least 30 m from bystanders (5 m in low-speed mode). Requires an A2 certificate.
A3: Drones weighing up to 25 kg — at least 150 m from residential, commercial, industrial, and recreational areas.
Never fly over crowds without special permission.
Check the LFV Drone Map and NOTAMs before each flight.
importantNotes: As of January 1, 2026, it is a criminal offense to fly a drone weighing 250 g or more without a valid drone license—punishable by a fine or up to six months in prison.
Nature reserves and national parks often have their own restrictions—check with the County Administrative Board for the specific area.
Protected sites (military bases, prisons, power plants, etc.) — flying is prohibited without a permit. Marked on the Drone Map.
In the event of an accident or incident involving a drone weighing more than 250 g — report it to the Swedish Transport Agency via an incident report.
Insurance is strongly recommended—some home insurance policies cover drone flights, while others do not.

fields.disclaimerText: Always check official sources before flying. This app is a tool—not a legal source. Rules are subject to change without notice.
